0af52393-add0-4695-9573-268c70b772a6.label: text_chunk

dd7ad6d4-7c37-4807-bff2-afeff2b9d2ef.label: text_chunk

f154343b-d6ca-4a5c-a3b8-4ab7328a4f26.label: text_chunk
f154343b-d6ca-4a5c-a3b8-4ab7328a4f26.text:
The  data  owner  is  under  an  obligation  in  certain  circumstances  to  share  data  with  the  prospective applicant and may in any event choose to do so regardless of that obligation;
The Parties are entering into data sharing negotiations;

87e880dc-fecf-4279-80fc-2095dd1b6ced.label: text_chunk

7350c033-e180-47ab-a4cd-b7fdcfce7d6f.label: text_chunk
7350c033-e180-47ab-a4cd-b7fdcfce7d6f.text:
Disclosure of Information

a.

 A Party may disclose to the other Party information with a view to negotiating the sharing of data for a purpose under  the BPR (“ the Purpose ”).   The Parties agree that the terms and conditions set forth in  this Agreement shall govern any such disclosure of information.

5c9c2467-f2b4-4510-b4ac-d6ba6f4c5cc2.label: text_chunk
5c9c2467-f2b4-4510-b4ac-d6ba6f4c5cc2.text: All information disclosed by a Party or by Affiliates of a Party to the other Party or its respective Affiliates  orally,  electronically,  writing  or  by  any  other  means  during  the  data  sharing negotiations  shall  be  considered  as  confidential  unless  expressly  stated  otherwise  by  the disclosing  Party.

117f74bd-648c-4696-a780-bec422ac79c7.label: text_chunk
117f74bd-648c-4696-a780-bec422ac79c7.text: All  such  confidential  information  shall  be  referred  to  hereinafter  as " ".  Information shall also include the identity of the Parties, the contents of this agreement and the fact that they have entered into this Agreement.

957fe07e-5935-4f02-86d0-021acd353c48.label: text_chunk
957fe07e-5935-4f02-86d0-021acd353c48.text:
NON-DISCLOSURE / CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT

b. The  Information,  including  any  material  support  containing  Information,

  will  remain  the exclusive property of the disclosing Party and the receiving Party will not acquire any right, title, license or interest on or to the Information.

aac4e848-40a4-4855-b017-0c27fbe827c9.label: text_chunk
aac4e848-40a4-4855-b017-0c27fbe827c9.text:
c. For any disputes arising from the supply,

 receipt or use of Information by an Affiliate of a Party, this Party shall bear sole responsibility for the purposes of this Agreement.

0e5b33e3-264d-43e1-87b0-a04011918de2.label: text_chunk
0e5b33e3-264d-43e1-87b0-a04011918de2.text:
“ ” shall mean any company controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a Party to this Agreement, control meaning in this context the direct or indirect ownership of more than fifty percent (50%) of the voting stock/shares of a company, or the power to nominate more  than  half  of  the  directors,  or  the  power  otherwise  to  determine  the  policy  of  a company or organisation.

2.

3d63df17-71a1-4c20-88c2-6d23bd4bf6fa.label: text_chunk
3d63df17-71a1-4c20-88c2-6d23bd4bf6fa.text:
Use of Information

a.

 The receiving Party undertakes not to use the Information  disclosed to it for  any purpose except  the  Purpose.  This  Agreement  does  not  constitute  a  license  by  implication  or otherwise to use the Information commercially or otherwise.

a45c940f-20e2-4170-9829-8e306062ec81.label: text_chunk
a45c940f-20e2-4170-9829-8e306062ec81.text:
b.

 The  Parties  shall  disclose  the  Information  to  their  employees,  Affiliates,  external  experts and/or  consultants  only  on  a  need  to  know  basis  and  only  to  the  extent  absolutely necessary  for  the  Purpose.

67c11a67-98db-4a73-a879-f2c8d29d30ac.label: text_chunk
67c11a67-98db-4a73-a879-f2c8d29d30ac.text:
Each  Party  shall  require  that  its  external  experts  and/or consultants also have such policies and procedures in place to ensure their compliance with these confidentiality obligations.

c.

 The obligations specified in this Article shall not apply to Information for which the receiving Party can reasonably demonstrate that such Information:

i.

 was known to the receiving Party on a non-confidential basis prior to its disclosure pursuant to this Agreement;

ii.

2612c3b7-c8ad-4acb-bc7d-434cef724e63.label: text_chunk
2612c3b7-c8ad-4acb-bc7d-434cef724e63.text:
is  publicly  known  at  the  time  of  disclosure  or  thereafter  becomes  publicly  known without breach of the terms of this Agreement on the part of the receiving Party;

iii. becomes known to the receiving Party through disclosure by sources other than the disclosing Party,

 having a right to disclose such Information,

iv.

 was  independently  developed  by  the  receiving  Party  without  access  to  the disclosing Party’s Information.

479857ec-fb91-48fe-a330-683cf99e2cf6.label: text_chunk
479857ec-fb91-48fe-a330-683cf99e2cf6.text:
3. Applicable law and arbitration

a.

 The Parties shall first attempt to settle amicably any dispute arising out of this Agreement. Any  dispute  that  cannot  be  settled  amicably  between  the  Parties  shall  be  exclusively resolved by arbitration. The arbitration rules of [ … ]  shall be applicable.  The place of any hearing shall be [ … ]  and the language of the arbitration shall be [ … ].

7887b164-ad2e-4dc8-8bbf-5e763c6ff42d.label: text_chunk
7887b164-ad2e-4dc8-8bbf-5e763c6ff42d.text:
b. This  Agreement shall be governed  by the laws of  [ … ],

 without regard to any principle of conflict  or  choice  of  laws  that  would  cause  the  application  of  the  laws  of  any  other jurisdiction.

c.

 If at any time any provision of this Agreement is or becomes invalid or illegal in any respect, this shall have no effect on the validity of the remaining contractual provisions.

749b950c-022d-42e3-87bb-5f8e886d4563.label: text_chunk
749b950c-022d-42e3-87bb-5f8e886d4563.text:
The invalid provisions  are  to  be  replaced,  backdated  to  the  time  of  their  becoming  ineffective,  by provisions which come closest to achieving their objective as agreed by the Parties.

4. Assignment

a.

 This Agreement may not be assigned by a Party hereto without the express written consent to such assignment by the other Parties.

5.

f7c3dd25-0eb7-471a-933e-6628959dc45f.label: text_chunk
f7c3dd25-0eb7-471a-933e-6628959dc45f.text:
Other

a.

 No  amendment or  modification  of this Agreement shall be valid  or  binding on  the Parties unless made in writing and signed on behalf of each of the Parties by their respective duly authorised officers or representatives.

9bef3854-9eee-4c1b-93e6-c9240181a593.label: text_chunk
9bef3854-9eee-4c1b-93e6-c9240181a593.text:
b.

 This Agreement shall be valid when signed by duly authorised representatives of the Parties and shall be binding on each Party for 10 (ten) years as from the date of signature of the last signatory,  even  if  at  the  end  of  the  negotiations  a  data  sharing  agreement  is  not  signed between the Parties, or until such time as the Information enters into the public domain.

9d7496d9-0889-47f1-ad71-140cd27d0f35.label: text_chunk
9d7496d9-0889-47f1-ad71-140cd27d0f35.text: This Agreement shall be executed in multiple counterparts which together shall constitute but one original.Signed _____________________ _______________________ Dated _____________________ _______________________

community_summary.0:
The relationships between the Data Owner and the Prospective Applicant highlight a significant interaction centered around data access and sharing. 

1. **Data Owner and Prospective Applicant**: The Data Owner is the primary entity that the Prospective Applicant aims to engage with to gain access to specific data. This indicates a foundational relationship where the Prospective Applicant seeks collaboration or permission from the Data Owner.

2. **Data Sharing Obligations**: The Data Owner is required to share data with the Prospective Applicant under certain conditions. This establishes a formal obligation that underscores the importance of data exchange in their relationship, suggesting that the Prospective Applicant may have legitimate reasons or rights to access the data.

Overall, the relationship is characterized by the Prospective Applicant's pursuit of data access from the Data Owner, coupled with the Data Owner's responsibility to share data when appropriate, reflecting a structured and potentially regulated interaction.
community_summary.1:
The relationships outlined involve a prospective applicant and a data owner, with a focus on regulatory compliance and data access. 

1. **Prospective Applicant and Data Owner**: The prospective applicant is actively seeking access to data owned by the data owner. This indicates a formal request for permission to utilize the data, highlighting the importance of data ownership and access rights.

2. **Prospective Applicant and Biocidal Products Regulation 528/2012**: The prospective applicant is also in compliance with the Biocidal Products Regulation 528/2012. This suggests that their request for data access is not only a procedural step but is also aligned with regulatory requirements, emphasizing the applicant's intention to adhere to legal standards in their activities.

In summary, the prospective applicant is navigating the dual aspects of seeking data access from the data owner while ensuring compliance with relevant biocidal product regulations, underscoring the significance of regulatory adherence in data utilization.
community_summary.2:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Parties and Data Owner**: The Parties are engaged in negotiations concerning data sharing, with the Data Owner being a key participant in these discussions.

2. **Parties and Agreement**: The Parties have formally entered into an Agreement, establishing a legal framework that binds them to the terms specified within the document.

3. **Parties and Information Disclosure**: The Parties hold the responsibility to disclose Information to authorized individuals and entities, ensuring that sensitive data is shared appropriately.

4. **Parties and Employee Access**: Employees of the Parties are permitted to access the Information as part of their job duties, indicating a structured approach to data handling within the organizations.

5. **Parties and Information Sharing**: The Agreement allows the Parties to share Information, detailing the conditions under which such sharing is permissible, thereby facilitating collaboration while maintaining compliance.

Overall, these relationships highlight the collaborative efforts of the Parties in negotiating and formalizing an Agreement that governs the sharing and management of Information, with clear roles and responsibilities outlined for both the Parties and their employees.

community_summary.13:
The relationships surrounding the "Agreement" highlight its critical role in governing the arbitration process and its binding nature on the involved parties. 

1. **Agreement and Arbitration**: The Agreement outlines the arbitration process, specifying the terms for resolving disputes that cannot be settled amicably. This establishes a structured approach to conflict resolution.

2. **Legal Framework**: The Agreement is governed by specific laws, indicating that its terms are subject to the legal framework, ensuring compliance and enforceability.

3. **Binding Nature**: The Agreement is binding on all parties involved, meaning that the outlined terms must be adhered to by each party, reinforcing accountability.

4. **Execution in Counterparts**: The Agreement can be executed in multiple counterparts, which together form a complete document, allowing for flexibility in how the Agreement is signed and acknowledged by the parties.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the Agreement's foundational role in arbitration, its legal grounding, the obligation it imposes on parties, and its practical execution.
community_summary.14:
**Summary of Relationships Involving the Party:**

1. **Confidential Information Protection**: The Party is tasked with the responsibility of safeguarding any disclosed confidential information, ensuring its protection unless otherwise specified. This establishes a critical relationship of responsibility and confidentiality.

2. **Responsibility for Affiliate Actions**: The Party holds responsibility for any disputes that may arise from the actions of its Affiliate. This indicates a direct accountability where the Party must address the consequences of the Affiliate's conduct.

3. **Binding Agreement**: The Party is bound by the terms of an Agreement that outlines its responsibilities and liabilities concerning the Affiliate and other involved entities. This relationship emphasizes the legal obligations the Party must adhere to.

4. **Control Over Company**: The Party can exert control over a Company if it owns more than fifty percent of its voting stock or shares. This relationship highlights the Party's ability to influence the Company's decisions and policies significantly.

5. **Access to Information**: The Party has access to Information as part of the agreement and is responsible for managing this Information, which includes ensuring confidentiality and compliance with relevant obligations. This relationship underscores the Party's role in handling sensitive data responsibly.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the Party's significant responsibilities and control within its network, emphasizing accountability, legal obligations, and the importance of confidentiality in its operations.

The relationships summarized from the knowledge graph highlight the key aspects of an Agreement and its connection to a Project and involved Parties:

1. **Agreement and Project**: The Agreement governs the Project, detailing the obligations and conditions necessary for its execution and completion. It is specifically relevant to the Project, ensuring that the terms outlined are applicable to the initiative.

2. **Agreement and Party**: The Agreement serves as the subject matter that dictates the actions and references made by the Party involved. It outlines the rights and obligations of each Party under its terms, emphasizing the importance of the Agreement in guiding their interactions.

3. **Agreement Content**: The term 'Agreement' refers to the legal document itself, which includes various provisions, such as a severability clause, ensuring clarity and enforceability of its terms.

4. **Dispute Resolution**: The Agreement specifies that any disputes arising from it will be resolved by the Danish Institute of Arbitration, indicating a structured approach to conflict resolution through arbitration.

Overall, the relationships illustrate the Agreement's central role in governing the Project and defining the responsibilities of the Parties involved, while also providing mechanisms for resolving disputes.

community_summary.21:
The relationships summarized below highlight the interactions involving the entity "Discloser" and its connections with "Recipient," "Client," "Confidential Information," and "Affiliates":

1. **Discloser and Recipient**: The Discloser provides and discloses information to the Recipient under confidentiality agreements, establishing a relationship based on trust and the protection of sensitive data. This relationship is characterized by the Discloser's authority to control the disclosure of Confidential Information and the active measures taken to seek protection for this information.

2. **Discloser and Client**: The Discloser facilitates consultations between the Client and the Recipient, indicating a supportive role in connecting these parties for discussions or transactions.

3. **Discloser and Confidential Information**: The Discloser has a protective relationship with Confidential Information, controlling its disclosure and actively seeking legal protection when necessary. This underscores the importance of safeguarding sensitive data in their operations.
